source: Kasiya Definitive Feasibility Study (Apr 16, 2026): pre-tax NPV8 US$2,204M; Phase 1 capex US$727M; steady-state 222 ktpa rutile + 275 ktpa graphite; DFS prices US$1,670/t rutile and US$1,288/t graphite (LOM avg FOB); operating cost US$450/t product (FOB Nacala, ex royalties). Practara DCF; 25-year mine life.

assets.name: Natural rutile
assets.notes: South plant construction Years 1–2; ore feed from Year 3 per DFS mine plan. Phase 1 capex US$727M cash-flowed Years 1–2.

assets.name: Natural flake graphite
assets.notes: North plant expansion (Phase 2) capex US$511M in Year 5 per DFS; steady-state graphite 275 ktpa.

financingNotes: DFS economics are unlevered pre-tax; debt/funding mix not yet finalized per company disclosure.
